snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Repository foundation Linux CI development-launch replacement review
reviewers.independence: The independent replacement reviewer examined the exact four-part Linux CI predicate, case-folded environment stripping, exhaustive body-free stages, real launch and process-tree cleanup and returned CLEAR after all three blockers were repaired.

dimensions.summary: Existing Repository, Quality, Release and Phase 0 owners locate root commands, fresh-install launch evidence and generated reports without a new document or product surface.
Owners agree on explicit root checks, isolated Electron, Linux+CI+GitHub-Actions+fixed no-sandbox authority, case-folded stripping, exhaustive safe stages, readiness, cleanup and upload.
Three exact selectors update repository and partial E0.01/E0.02/E0.04/E0.10 evidence; semantic lock v3 has 1,200 claims and every Requirement, Exit and phase status remains unchanged.

Development gets one root recipe that strips inherited authority across platform name semantics, admits only the exact Linux CI predicate, reports four exhaustive safe stages and terminates its process tree.
No Markdown file or decision is added; owner deduplication and semantic-neutral manifest compression keep every leanness budget green.

verification.evidence: The exact seven-path Development plus six-path governed candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate test, package and distribution evidence
verification.evidence: Focused 2/20 and full 107/1,233 pass with typecheck, build, real development Electron and the prior exact package/distribution evidence unchanged.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The candidate retains 57 dependency records with zero waivers; CON-001 through CON-004 and semantic lock v3/1,200 pass with no Requirement, Exit or phase status drift.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 56 Markdown files, 3,466 entry words, 4,054 trace lines, 249,852 trace bytes and 1,212,998 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: Repository foundation Linux CI development-launch replacement
coordination.compatibility: This candidate adds executable repository evidence without changing application behavior, dependencies, runtime ownership, public claims or statuses.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze replacement v2 across the same seven paths; independent review returned CLEAR after three P1 repairs. Product Planning rebound only the six existing governed files without changing Development bytes.

nonBlockingRisks: Replacement Linux CI and actual Windows development-launch/process-tree evidence remain external/open until online gates pass.
Final lstat-to-rename syscall TOCTOU and broader signed/installed platform proof remain open.
The separate public-template YAML validator remains open until a direct reviewed dependency exists.
